scripts.build: anchor build && pnpm --filter @meridian/app build && pnpm --filter @meridian/automation build
scripts.test: cargo test --manifest-path programs/meridian/Cargo.toml && pnpm exec tsx --test tests/**/*.ts
scripts.deploy:devnet: dotenv -e .env -- anchor deploy --provider.cluster devnet --program-name meridian --program-keypair keys/meridian-program.json
